recentTweets.text:
For a tech bro you sure sound like a 1950s racist. Here’s a tip, the next time you have a take on slavery or Black families, hit delete.

Nonsense about Black people being better off before we had rights, when we were discriminated against… you’re really telling on yourself.

Trump’s ICE is terrorizing the country and two more people are dead.

It’s a systematic attack on basic rights - and it goes way beyond immigration. https://t.co/zAHnaE9GWu
Blatant corruption https://t.co/MytE8TvvCL

Trump’s health care cuts are a nationwide disaster, but nowhere has been hit harder than Ohio. 

Over 30% of people enrolled in ACA plans have lost coverage due to Republican price hikes – all to give tax cuts to the wealthy.

We must cancel the GOP cuts to the ACA and Medicaid and protect health care.

https://t.co/VtK8YzW7Eb
Put this on a billboard ⤵️

It's a complete culture of corruption in Trump's White House.   

Everyone is focused on using their position to make a buck, instead of serving the people. 

https://t.co/vdwFucZPVs

Shameful, dangerous, and absurd lies. 

All from the same crew that wants to pardon and pay those who attacked the Capitol to overturn an election. 

Go back to losing football games, Coach.

ICE is out of control – with fatal consequences. Two more people have been killed.

And despite what ICE and Trump think, they are NOT above the law.

I joined my Democratic colleagues to demand transparency and push for an independent investigation into the latest ICE shootings. https://t.co/yy35yixrbK

Someone take away this man's microphone. He's confused, rambling, lying... all at the same time. 

CHIPS funding to support advanced manufacturing jobs in Northeast Ohio was announced literally yesterday.
https://t.co/nEXy3JLYg9

What a disastrous and immoral Trump Administration.

Trump's kids got rich.  

While Ohio kids went hungry. 

https://t.co/wAOjaNh7yC

Catch me on The Fly-In with @RepGregLandsman & @RepVeasey. We’re breaking down the impact of Trump’s policies on Americans. Stay tuned for the analysis and stick around for some fun towards the end. You won’t want to miss this. Available now wherever you get your podcasts. https://t.co/IRyA1vD3Al
Click the link to watch now: https://t.co/TIVQ0uEEQt
My statement on the Massie Amendment vote. https://t.co/sigEkNBZ29
RT @NewDemCoalition: On this week's episode of The Fly-In, host @RepGregLandsman & @RepVeasey are joined by @RepShontelBrown to discuss one…

I’m on the latest episode of The Fly-in this week. Be sure to check out the episode and hear @RepGregLandsman,  @RepVeasey, and I talk about this administration’s impact on our social safety net programs and taxpayers’ bottom line. Tune in today!

Big news: we just won a huge federal grant for manufacturing in NE Ohio, from a program created by the CHIPs and Science Act, which I proudly voted for.

The NEO-SMART program connecting research and industry is now eligible for up to $160 million for jobs and innovation. https://t.co/rrFBxXe4e6

Absolutely not. I’m so tired of Republicans acting like they’re in a cult.

Can we please stop with this nonsense? Do not put this man’s face on currency. This is illegal, unnecessary, and 100% unwanted.

Interested in learning more about federal grants and the application process?

My office is hosting an OH-11 Grants Summit next week. Click here for more information: https://t.co/qiHBTdPwt2

Four years ago, I proudly voted for the CHIPs and Science Act to boost advanced manufacturing in America.

Now, because of that bill, federal funding is headed to NE Ohio to create jobs.

This critical investment reinforces that Northeast Ohio has the talent, institutions, and industrial base to lead the next generation of American manufacturing.

https://t.co/xKjrvZsWvo

Big news: the @cwru led NEO-SMART manufacturing partnership has received a massive federal grant of up to $160 million to support jobs and innovation in NE Ohio. This huge investment is made possible by the CHIPS and Science Act, which I proudly voted for. https://t.co/r2inCjgFLW
This is not enough. Trump's ICE is completely out of control. This agency must be held accountable to the fullest extent of the law.

ICE agents have now fatally shot two individuals in the past week, first in Texas and now in Maine. It is beyond clear that Trump’s reckless and lawless ICE is not making us safer.

This is why I’ve fought for oversight and accountability in the past year, and why it was shameful
Good. Those enacting Trump's lawlessness and abuse of power should be held accountable.
RT @NewDemCoalition: Excited to have @RepShontelBrown on The Fly-In this week to talk gas & grocery costs, healthcare, one year of Republic…

While millions struggle to get by, this White House is treating Americans' hard-earned tax dollars like Trump's own personal ATM.
 
Here's how Trump is wasting your money to line his own pockets. https://t.co/ZejRcwWS2o

Instead of upholding the Constitution and representing ALL Americans, Republicans in Congress keep doubling down on hate and Islamophobia.

That’s why I joined @RepJamesClyburn  and other colleagues in writing to congressional leaders to condemn the GOP’s Sharia-Free America

My thoughts and prayers are with Senator Graham’s family and loved ones following his sudden passing. 

May he Rest in Peace after his years of service to South Carolina.

161,000 Ohioans have lost ACA healthcare coverage because of Republican cuts. The largest loss of coverage in the country. 
 
While Trump is raking in billions, Ohio families are suffering. https://t.co/u4wcYRkHm0

Trump’s war with Iran was an epic failure on every level.
And now taxpayers are stuck with the bill. https://t.co/pcHMVtGur1

This week, I held an immigration roundtable with community representatives. Trump’s dangerous anti-immigrant agenda is hurting families here and nationwide. We discussed the need for legislative action and working locally to ensure that NE Ohio is safe and welcoming to all. https://t.co/cPCo5cnZk1

The Trump Administration's DOGE-inspired plan to sell the Celebrezze Federal Building is appropriately being audited. This isn't just a line on a spreadsheet for us in Cleveland, it's about our access to federal agencies, our federal workforce, and our economy.

So glad I joined the Intercity Yacht Club & heard about their efforts to lift up our community. When resources were scarce for Black folks, they stood up for us. Now, they're expanding to offer youth & workforce opportunities & I'm so glad I could be there for the unveiling. https://t.co/OQ8OYugqn5

161,000 Ohioans have lost their health care because of Republican cuts.

All to give tax cuts to the rich. Absolutely shameful.
https://t.co/ifKXZvwXA4
.... your administration's signature and singular legislative achievement is cutting health care and food assistance for families to pay for tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires?

Over 161,000 Ohioans have lost health care coverage because of Trump and his Republican allies.

This is an absolute catastrophe – and people will suffer because of it.

https://t.co/KCu2mXg6Bj

161,385 Ohioans have lost ACA health care coverage following the Trump health care cuts according to official data. This is a 32% drop, the worst in the country.

While Trump builds a ballroom to himself, thousands of Ohioans can no longer get the basic health care they need. https://t.co/5hGumoRW0k
The Supreme Court ruling that struck down Trump's attempt to end birthright citizenship may have been a win, but it's more alarming than it seems. Here's why: https://t.co/T1EOM8Jnvh

In the past week we’ve had a number of power outages in the Cleveland area, which meant many people had to throw out food. If you rely on SNAP benefits and lost power for more than 4 hours, you are eligible to receive replacement benefits to purchase new food.

Signal Cleveland

Good luck to Team USA tonight! 

This is your moment, and our entire country is behind you, every step of the way!
So he’s admitting his constant election denial is nothing more than a lie…

How many times do we have to say it?

The American people hated the first war and they don’t want another one.
One year after Trump's "Big, Beautiful Bill" became law, the results are anything but beautiful... https://t.co/XEcnurLMA8
Happy Independence Day! On our nation’s 250th birthday, I wanted to share my thoughts on what it means to be American. https://t.co/xe7In3OQ38
You can thank Trump for your skyrocketing grocery bills this 4th of July.

Sixty years ago today, the Civil Rights Act was signed into law. As we celebrate the hard-fought victories won, I can't help but reflect on how current efforts to gut voting rights remind us that the fight to make our voices heard in our government is far from over.

If we can
Kash Patel left me on read … but I’m not letting this one go. https://t.co/5bfqRe9BK0

Thanks to Trump's SNAP cuts, more than 100,000 Ohioans have been kicked off basic food assistance.

And while millions of Americans struggle to keep up with rising food costs, Trump and Rollins are celebrating rising hunger as a policy win. Unbelievable.

Frank LaRose thought it was cute to get in a Twitter fight with me about handing over Ohioans' sensitive information to Trump's DOJ.
 
But now federal court validated our concerns, ruling the Trump data system is UNLAWFUL. https://t.co/B9ssa5YPxh

July is fibroids awareness month. As someone who’s dealt with fibroids, I know just how devastating the lack of research & treatment options can be. With this crisis impacting half of all women by age 50, Congress must do more to ensure women get the care they deserve. https://t.co/vxpLQi7QWA

While Americans are struggling to afford the basics, President Trump is cashing in. 
 
His policies stack the deck for the wealthiest like himself, leaving everyday Americans stuck with the bill.

The Supreme Court just gave states the green light to openly discriminate against transgender students.
 
All to fuel a manufactured culture war for political gain.
 
As an @EqualityCaucus member, I’ll never stop fighting for dignity, safety, and equal protection under the law.

What started as a racist lie against Haitians is now official U.S. policy, thanks to the Supreme Court. It is wrong on so many levels.
 
The House already passed a bill to protect TPS for Haitians, and now the Senate must act before it's too late. https://t.co/4L7U7OWydQ

Another day, another Supreme Court ruling that gives wealthy donors and special interests even more influence over our elections.

We need to end Citizens United and reform campaign finance laws to get dark money out of politics.

I'm glad the Supreme Court got one thing right today., but we didn't need a court to tell us what the Constitution already does.

No President gets to change who counts as American.

BREAKING: Another one of Trump's election lies just fell apart. The Supreme Court upheld counting mail-in ballots that arrive during the grace period for elections.

This is a major win for voting rights and a rejection of Republicans' efforts to block access to the ballot box.

Steel is part of who we are in NE Ohio. 

We need to make sure this industry can thrive and continue supporting good-paying union jobs for generations to come.  

It was great seeing representatives from Cleveland Cliffs and USW at the Steel Caucus hearing this week. https://t.co/LI5aO91XKT

The only one who destroyed anything is... Stephen Miller. 

He's destroyed communities, trampled the Constitution, and turbocharged racist mass deportation efforts.

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

If we can

And while millions of Americans struggle to keep up with rising food costs, Trump and Rollins are celebrating rising hunger as a policy win. Unbelievable.

Frank LaRose thought it was cute to get in a Twitter fight with me about handing over Ohioans' sensitive information to Trump's DOJ.
 
But now federal court validated our concerns, ruling the Trump data system is UNLAWFUL. https://t.co/B9ssa5YPxh

July is fibroids awareness month. As someone who’s dealt with fibroids, I know just how devastating the lack of research & treatment options can be. With this crisis impacting half of all women by age 50, Congress must do more to ensure women get the care they deserve. https://t.co/vxpLQi7QWA

While Americans are struggling to afford the basics, President Trump is cashing in. 
 
His policies stack the deck for the wealthiest like himself, leaving everyday Americans stuck with the bill.

The Supreme Court just gave states the green light to openly discriminate against transgender students.
 
All to fuel a manufactured culture war for political gain.
 
As an @EqualityCaucus member, I’ll never stop fighting for dignity, safety, and equal protection under the law.

What started as a racist lie against Haitians is now official U.S. policy, thanks to the Supreme Court. It is wrong on so many levels.
 
The House already passed a bill to protect TPS for Haitians, and now the Senate must act before it's too late. https://t.co/4L7U7OWydQ

Another day, another Supreme Court ruling that gives wealthy donors and special interests even more influence over our elections.

We need to end Citizens United and reform campaign finance laws to get dark money out of politics.

I'm glad the Supreme Court got one thing right today., but we didn't need a court to tell us what the Constitution already does.

No President gets to change who counts as American.

BREAKING: Another one of Trump's election lies just fell apart. The Supreme Court upheld counting mail-in ballots that arrive during the grace period for elections.

This is a major win for voting rights and a rejection of Republicans' efforts to block access to the ballot box.

Steel is part of who we are in NE Ohio. 

We need to make sure this industry can thrive and continue supporting good-paying union jobs for generations to come.  

It was great seeing representatives from Cleveland Cliffs and USW at the Steel Caucus hearing this week. https://t.co/LI5aO91XKT

The only one who destroyed anything is... Stephen Miller. 

He's destroyed communities, trampled the Constitution, and turbocharged racist mass deportation efforts.

The Supreme Court handed Trump a license for mass deportation. It’s a moral, humanitarian, and community disaster for our neighbors in Ohio.

https://t.co/ofHOGW3U1A

Congress must act. In April, I proudly voted for legislation to extend TPS status. It is imperative that the Senate pass this legislation quickly.

We cannot in good conscience let the Trump Administration deport thousands back to life-threatening conditions in Haiti.

As I gather support for my resolution to recognize June as Black Music Month, I'm asking my colleagues about their favorite Black Musician and what Black music means to them.
 
It's safe to say Queen Bey's inspirational anthems are a House favorite! https://t.co/D1C7nbNg9w

Today's ruling from the Supreme Court is nothing but a license to feed Trump’s hateful and racist mass deportation machine. 

The Court has issued a devastating verdict for the thousands of Haitians who are here legally. Congress must act to extend TPS for Haiti. https://t.co/mg6pekzzFZ
This is a disgraceful day for our country and another example of the Trump-majority on the Supreme Court choosing to be a rubber stamp, rather than a check and balance.

Unbelievable. Trump’s war was a total failure that made life more expensive.

Now, he’s wants $70 billion to pay for it.

With that war money we could cut ACA premiums in half for 20 million Americans – which MAGA says we can’t afford.

Trump’s friends got rich, we got the bill.

I applaud the continued display of strength and courage from @RepLaMonica in the face of the absurd charges from the Trump Admin. 

Conducting oversight is not a crime. Democracy dies when lawmakers are punished for simply doing their jobs.

At a time when prices keep going up, millions of Americans have lost nutrition assistance because of Trump's Big Ugly Law. 

Meanwhile the desserts keep flowing at Mar-a-Lago. 

https://t.co/PGRBq9JBPF

I am so grateful to Team Brown and my friends for surprising me on my birthday! Thank you to everyone who has reached out to wish me a special day. It has been a long year in Congress with the constant craziness, but I feel truly blessed. https://t.co/IE4Sv9TWxg
The cruel reality of America after the Trump-majority Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade ⤵️

Four years ago today, the Supreme Court overturned #RoevWade and we are still dealing with the terrible consequences of this extreme ruling.

Reproductive rights are fundamental and abortion is health care. I will not stop fighting until we restore our rights nationwide.

Trump DOES NOT CARE about the higher costs that are crushing families.

He raised prices with tariffs, he raised health care costs with his cuts, and now he’s blocking housing legislation.

Trump is a selfish man focused only on making his family and friends rich.

Been waiting for this one. Despite being told we don’t understand election administration, Trump’s illegal and reckless attempt to harvest SS numbers to purge voters was just stopped in federal court. It’s another L for @FrankLaRose https://t.co/ll9YaAd5qN

This is a win. Now, we need to do more, including passing my bills to strengthen affordable housing and lead removal programs.  

https://t.co/OVfX5LmIfJ

Proud to have voted for legislation to build more homes and lower housing costs. 

Too many Americans are struggling to find affordable housing and are locked out of homeownership, including in NE Ohio. That’s why we host our Housing Expo each year.

Black women have always stood up to protect our communities. @RepLaMonica did just that when she showed up at Delaney Hall in NJ.
Now she’s facing persecution.

I’m joining @HouseDemocrats to support @RepLaMonica because targeting elected officials conducting oversight is wrong.

This ruling gets it right, the Trump effort to further restrict SNAP purchases is not just wrong it’s unlawful.

Millions have already lost nutrition assistance because of Trump’s Big Ugly Law. We need to protect nutrition benefits, not weaken them.

https://t.co/fdNYjM8xp3

Trump and Republicans in Congress kicked 4 million Americans – and counting – off of basic food assistance (just $6/day) to pay for more tax handouts for millionaires and billionaires. 

Trump’s Big Ugly Law is a moral disaster and must be repealed.

Correct. No transparency and no information from the FBI. They conducted a massive raid, in an election year, targeting voter registration efforts. 

Clevelanders need answers.

The Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool is an encapsulation of Trump’s failed presidency: bad ideas with a side of corruption that lead to a bad result.
Trump has turned a national landmark into an embarrassment.

https://t.co/i46si8NoMD

Another loss for Trump in the courts, as a federal judge raises the same privacy concerns I did in my letter to Ohio Sec of State LaRose.

https://t.co/pTOtEQLx5F

I was honored to join @CleFoodBank last week as they unveiled plans for the West Side Community Resource Center. 
 
I’ve been proud to secure federal funding for the GCFB because they demonstrate what it means to serve those in need with respect and dignity. https://t.co/K68RBuNFAA

Trump's FBI conducted a massive raid targeting voter registration efforts in Cleveland. 

We need answers - because I will not let NE Ohio voters be subject to an intimidation campaign.
https://t.co/qnakKWwuHr

As Trump makes people poorer and sicker, Ohio could also lose over 50,000 jobs. It’s another reason we must repeal Trump’s awful cuts. 

https://t.co/zau2DXB8nZ
The healthcare and nutrition assistance cuts in Trump’s Big Ugly Law aren’t just bad for families and people in need - they’re bad for our economy.

Happy Father’s Day to the man who has always been a source of strength for me. 

As a coach on the sidelines, or in any room you enter, you stand out. Your stature and steady presence have always made me feel supported, giving me the confidence to step forward, to stand up, and https://t.co/b6hHQiTcLz
We are not about to let this out-of-control administration ruin our Black joy. Especially not during Juneteenth! Happy Juneteenth y’all! https://t.co/1vRTys1XyN

Black Americans were the last to win the right to vote, now we’re the first to have FBI agents knocking at our door.
 
I’m deeply alarmed by the FBI’s raid in NE Ohio. I am speaking out and demanding answers from the FBI. Voter intimidation is unacceptable. https://t.co/gSnMAIFUtR

Trump’s failed war and failed negotiations reflect terrible leadership and worse judgement.

The war cost taxpayers billions and drove up the price of gas and groceries.

And in the end, Iran is stronger than when it began and America has been embarrassed on the world stage.

This week, I gathered elected officials, civic leaders, and clergy from across NE Ohio to speak out against Trump's FBI raid targeting voter registration, defend our right to vote, and demand answers from the FBI.

Voting is a right and we will not let Ohioans be intimidated. https://t.co/tnM2VOSAli

The Trump FBI conducted a massive raid targeting a voter registration group in NE Ohio. The FBI used hundreds of agents, in an election year, even going to people’s homes. 

Voting is a constitutional right – so we need answers. I’m demanding details from the FBI. https://t.co/N1Gfxk4pbd

Today, I led a letter with my Ohio colleagues demanding answers from Trump's FBI after their massive raid targeting voter registration in our state. 

We need answers because voter registration is not voter fraud. https://t.co/eWQMeYjhj3

Once a scam artist, always a scam artist.

It's so telling that Trump won't share what's in his Iran deal.

Cleveland's NYSP has continued to pour into the young folks of our community by offering programs to prepare students for college and their future ambitions.  This organization is setting our youth up for success, & I couldn't be prouder of the positive impact they have made. https://t.co/b4eilFN4Jt
